name: Orange & Lemon Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the orange and lemon skins into quarters close to the pulp and set aside.
2. Break up the pulps and remove seeds; add 1 cup water and simmer in a covered saucepan for 45 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, boil the orange and lemon rinds with 8 cups of water in a covered saucepan for 20 minutes. Drain off and discard the water.
4. Scrape out and discard all white pith from the orange and lemon skins down to the yellow rind.
5. Shred the yellow rinds as thin as possible, about 1 inch long.
6. Simmer the shredded rinds with 5 cups of water in a covered pan for 15 minutes. Drain off and discard the water.
7. Mix the cooked pulp with the shredded rinds.
8. Measure 4 level cups of this mixture into a large saucepan. Add enough water to make it level full, if necessary.
9. Add sugar and mix well. Stir the mixture constantly until it comes to a vigorous boil over the hottest heat possible.
10. Boil hard for 3 minutes with continual stirring.
11. Remove from the heat and stir in the pectin. Let stand for 5 minutes only, by the clock, with occasional stirring to cool slightly and pour quickly.
